questions.question: What is the maximum level of task generality and autonomy that AI systems will achieve before 2030 without direct human oversight?
questions.why_it_matters: Knowing this informs governance, safety protocols, and economic planning around AI deployment and labor displacement.
signals_to_watch: deployment of autonomous AI in critical infrastructure
regulatory approvals for fully autonomous AI systems

questions.question: Will global semiconductor supply chains achieve resilience to geopolitical disruptions by 2027, reducing the risk of multi-month chip shortages?
questions.why_it_matters: Semiconductor availability underpins nearly all modern technology and economic stability in tech-dependent sectors.

questions.question: Can global coordinated cyber defense mechanisms reduce successful large-scale cyberattacks by nation-states by over 50% within the next five years?
questions.why_it_matters: Cyberattacks threaten critical infrastructure and geopolitical stability; effectiveness of defense coordination changes risk assessments.
signals_to_watch: frequency and scale of state-level cyberattacks
implementation of joint cyber defense exercises

questions.question: Will at least one major democratic nation institute legally binding AI oversight institutions with enforcement powers by 2028?
questions.why_it_matters: Legal oversight frameworks will shape the safety and ethical deployment of AI technologies globally.
signals_to_watch: public and political opinion shifts on AI risks

questions.question: What percentage of current full-time professional jobs will be significantly automated by 2030 leading to structural unemployment without retraining programs?
questions.why_it_matters: Understanding this percentage guides investments in education, social safety nets, and economic policy reforms.

questions.question: Will a universally effective, single-dose vaccine for all major influenza strains be developed and approved for mass use by 2030?
questions.why_it_matters: Such a vaccine would drastically reduce seasonal flu burdens and reshape public health planning.

questions.question: Can global energy systems achieve net-zero carbon emissions by 2050 through scalable clean tech innovations without causing economic recession?
questions.why_it_matters: This determines climate change mitigation feasibility balanced against economic growth and stability.

questions.question: Will interactive AI-generated media content surpass traditional human-created media in audience engagement metrics by 2028?
questions.why_it_matters: This shift affects cultural production, intellectual property norms, and media economics.
signals_to_watch: investment levels in AI media platforms
